name: Poplar of the White Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Mystic Mystery of the White Forest
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 2 "White Forest" monsters in your GY; place them face-up in their owners' Spell & Trap Zones as Continuous Spells. During your opponent's Main Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon using this card you control. You can only use each effect of "Poplar of the White Forest" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters

During your opponent's Main Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon using this card you control. action: Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
Uses itself as a Synchro Material
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
